calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Laura L. Gildengorin, of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.421.3400, for plaintiffs Martin McNerney Development, Inc. & 418 Jessie Historic Properties, LLC;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARTIN MCNERNEY DEVELOPMENT, INC. DBA MARTIN, 418 JESSIE HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
